category.scope_note: LED luminaire and light source compliance comparison for Chinese manufacturers exporting to Georgia (GEOSTM), where EU technical regulations are being approximated under the EU-Georgia DCFTA.

title.en: China-to-Georgia LED Luminaire Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国 LED 灯具进入格鲁吉亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國 LED 燈具進入喬治亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China LED luminaire documentation against Georgia's GEOSTM-administered, EU-approximated conformity requirements (electrical safety, EMC, energy/ecodesign programmes, photobiological safety, RoHS approximation) versus Chinese GB standards and CCC certification. Under the EU-Georgia DCFTA, Georgia is gradually transposing EU technical regulations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国 LED 灯具文件与格鲁吉亚由 GEOSTM 管理、对欧盟趋同的合格评定要求（电气安全、电磁兼容、能效/生态设计计划、光生物安全、RoHS 趋同）差距对照，与中国 GB 标准及 CCC 认证对比。根据欧盟-格鲁吉亚 DCFTA，格鲁吉亚正逐步转化欧盟技术法规。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國 LED 燈具文件與喬治亞由 GEOSTM 管理、對歐盟趨同的合格評定要求（電氣安全、電磁兼容、能效/生態設計計劃、光生物安全、RoHS 趨同）差距對照，與中國 GB 標準及 CCC 認證對比。根據歐盟-喬治亞 DCFTA，喬治亞正逐步轉化歐盟技術法規。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity assessment, product safety determination, customs determination, or market-access approval. Georgia's technical-regulation framework is evolving as EU regulations are progressively approximated under the DCFTA; the applicable rules for a given product can change. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Georgian technical regulations, GEOSTM-adopted standards, energy programme requirements, GNCC radio rules, and importer obligations with qualified professionals before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定、产品安全认定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。随着 DCFTA 下欧盟法规逐步趋同，格鲁吉亚的技术法规框架仍在演变，特定产品适用的规则可能变化。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士核验现行格鲁吉亚技术法规、GEOSTM 采用的标准、能效计划要求、GNCC 无线电规则及进口商义务。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定、產品安全認定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。隨著 DCFTA 下歐盟法規逐步趨同，喬治亞的技術法規框架仍在演變，特定產品適用的規則可能變化。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行喬治亞技術法規、GEOSTM 採用的標準、能效計劃要求、GNCC 無線電規則及進口商義務。

answer_first.en: A Chinese LED luminaire manufacturer exporting to Georgia should expect a framework that is being progressively approximated to the EU under the DCFTA, administered by GEOSTM (Georgian National Agency for Standards and Metrology) with national conformity and market surveillance: electrical safety based on IEC 60598-1 / GEOSTM-adopted standards (EU LVD-style); EMC requirements aligned with IEC/CISPR 15 emission and IEC 61547 immunity bases; energy-efficiency / ecodesign programmes referencing EU light-source thresholds; photobiological safety classification per IEC/EN 62471; and EU RoHS approximation that is being phased in (not yet a fully mandatory 10-substance regime in all respects — confirm current status). Georgia's 220/380 V 50 Hz grid matches China, so no voltage/frequency redesign is needed. Smart/wireless luminaires additionally need GNCC (Georgian National Communications Commission) authorisation. An in-country importer typically bears conformity and labelling responsibility. None of this is covered by existing Chinese CCC certification; confirm the exact applicable Georgian technical regulation per product before shipment.
answer_first.zh: 向格鲁吉亚出口的中国 LED 灯具制造商应预期一个在 DCFTA 下逐步对欧盟趋同的框架，由 GEOSTM（格鲁吉亚国家标准与计量局）管理，配套国家合格评定及市场监督：电气安全以 IEC 60598-1 / GEOSTM 采用标准为基础（欧盟 LVD 式）；电磁兼容要求与 IEC/CISPR 15 发射及 IEC 61547 抗扰度基础对齐；能效/生态设计计划参照欧盟光源阈值；光生物安全依 IEC/EN 62471 分类；以及正在分阶段推行的欧盟 RoHS 趋同（尚非在所有方面完全强制的 10 项物质制度——请确认现行状态）。格鲁吉亚 220/380 V 50 Hz 电网与中国一致，无需电压/频率重新设计。智能/无线灯具还须取得 GNCC（格鲁吉亚国家通信委员会）授权。在地进口商通常承担合格评定及贴标责任。上述均不被现有中国 CCC 认证所涵盖；出货前请按产品确认确切适用的格鲁吉亚技术法规。
answer_first.zht: 向喬治亞出口的中國 LED 燈具製造商應預期一個在 DCFTA 下逐步對歐盟趨同的框架，由 GEOSTM（喬治亞國家標準與計量局）管理，配套國家合格評定及市場監督：電氣安全以 IEC 60598-1 / GEOSTM 採用標準為基礎（歐盟 LVD 式）；電磁兼容要求與 IEC/CISPR 15 發射及 IEC 61547 抗擾度基礎對齊；能效/生態設計計劃參照歐盟光源閾值；光生物安全依 IEC/EN 62471 分類；以及正在分階段推行的歐盟 RoHS 趨同（尚非在所有方面完全強制的 10 項物質制度——請確認現行狀態）。喬治亞 220/380 V 50 Hz 電網與中國一致，無需電壓/頻率重新設計。智能/無線燈具還須取得 GNCC（喬治亞國家通信委員會）授權。在地進口商通常承擔合格評定及貼標責任。上述均不被現有中國 CCC 認證所涵蓋；出貨前請按產品確認確切適用的喬治亞技術法規。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official Georgian regulator (GEOSTM, GNCC), EU regulation referenced for approximation context, IEC/EN standard reference, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs and non-official secondary sources are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true. Because Georgia is progressively approximating EU technical regulations under the DCFTA, the mandatory status of each requirement (especially RoHS and ecodesign/energy) must be re-verified against the current Georgian technical regulation in force on each review cycle.
